_meta.doctrine: Paper 41 (Uplift Audit Standard) + cli:17 (21 Uplift Principles)
_meta.note: Check all 21 uplifts are present in any artifact. 4 critical uplifts (P11+P13+P17+P21) must all be PRESENT. Score ≥18/21 to PASS.

artifact_type: paper | page | code | diagram | app | skill

context_injection.temporal_context: Date: 2026-03-04. Market: OpenClaw→OpenAI. Claude Sonnet 4.6. Llama 3.3 70B at $0.59/M.

uplift_checks.P1_GAMIFICATION: Is gamification present? (belt/rung/GLOW/progress/achievement visible or implied?)
uplift_checks.P2_MAGIC_WORDS: Is there a DNA equation? (compressed 1-line essence of the artifact?)
uplift_checks.P3_PERSONAS: Is a named domain expert referenced or acting as reviewer?
uplift_checks.P4_SKILLS: Are relevant skill files injected as context for this artifact?
uplift_checks.P6_TOOLS: Are OAuth3-scoped tools used (not raw unscoped API calls)?
uplift_checks.P7_MEMORY: Is evidence/memory referenced (evidence bundle, hash chain, vault)?
uplift_checks.P8_CARE: Is the human treated with EQ (not automated coldly, Anti-Clippy honored)?
uplift_checks.P9_KNOWLEDGE: Are papers/diagrams referenced as knowledge source?
uplift_checks.P10_GOD: Does this artifact serve the NORTHSTAR (65537)? Is the purpose sacred?
uplift_checks.P11_QUESTIONS: CRITICAL: Are ≥5 domain-specific binary questions present?
uplift_checks.P12_ANALOGIES: Is a cross-domain analogy used to bridge knowledge gaps?
uplift_checks.P13_CONSTRAINTS: CRITICAL: Is scoring binary (not averaged)? Is FALLBACK BAN enforced?
uplift_checks.P14_CHAIN_OF_THOUGHT: Is reasoning scaffolded sequentially? (questions → bugs → verdict)
uplift_checks.P15_FEW_SHOT: Is a quality exemplar provided for pattern completion?
uplift_checks.P16_NEGATIVE_SPACE: Are absence questions asked? (What is MISSING from this artifact?)
uplift_checks.P18_AUDIENCE: Is the reviewing audience specified by domain?
uplift_checks.P19_COMPRESSION: Is there a DNA equation or PASS/FAIL compression format?
uplift_checks.P20_TEMPORAL: Is a temporal anchor provided (date + market state)?
uplift_checks.P21_ADVERSARIAL: CRITICAL: Has an adversarial persona reviewed this artifact?

pass_threshold: Score ≥ 18/21 AND all 4 critical uplifts = PRESENT

checks.llm_verdict_required: You are REVIEWER_PERSONA reviewing this artifact as the final responsible party. For each of the 21 uplifts (P1-P21), answer PRESENT or ABSENT + one sentence of evidence. Then: calculate score (count of PRESENT). Check: are all 4 critical uplifts (P11+P13+P17+P21) PRESENT? Render verdict: UPLIFT_AUDIT_PASS (score/21 + all critical present) or UPLIFT_AUDIT_FAIL (score/21 + list missing critical uplifts + top 3 action items to fix).

negative_space_questions: Which of P1-P21 is most conspicuously ABSENT from this artifact?
What would applying the missing uplift add that the artifact currently lacks?
What quality risk exists specifically BECAUSE of the missing uplifts?
